Function: FID_conflict:_vfwprintf
Address: 0x456400


/* Library Function - Multiple Matches With Different Base Names
    _vfprintf
    _vfwprintf
   
   Library: Visual Studio 1998 Release */

int __cdecl FID_conflict__vfwprintf(FILE *_File,wchar_t *_Format,va_list _ArgList)

{
  int _Flag;
  int iVar1;
  
  _Flag = __stbuf(_File);
  iVar1 = FUN_00457ab0(_File,(byte *)_Format,(undefined4 *)_ArgList);
  __ftbuf(_Flag,_File);
  return iVar1;
}
